annotations.annotation: Chapter revised effective June 13, 2011 (38:12 Md. R. 705)
Regulation .02B amended effective January 6, 2014 (40:26 Md. R. 2164); April 13, 2015 (42:7 Md. R. 570)
Regulation .03 amended effective April 13, 2015 (42:7 Md. R. 570)
Regulation .04A amended effective April 13, 2015 (42:7 Md. R. 570)
Regulation .05 amended effective January 6, 2014 (40:26 Md. R. 2164)
Regulation .07A amended effective April 13, 2015 (42:7 Md. R. 570)
Chapter recodified from COMAR 10.43.18 to COMAR 10.65.03 under new Subtitle, Board of Massage Therapy Examiners, Code of Ethics, effective January 2, 2017 (43:26 Md. R. 1446)
